seo.title: OpenAI Fine-Tuning API for Fine-Tuning & Custom Models
seo.description: How OpenAI Fine-Tuning API fits into real Fine-Tuning & Custom Models workflows.

content.headline: LoRA Training Data Formatter
content.description: Converts raw text datasets into structured LoRA-compatible training formats with tokenization guidance

examples.label: CSV with tokens

input.raw_text: System: Keep it concise\nUser: Explain AI\nAssistant: Artificial intelligence...

examples.expected_output: text\n"<s>[INST] Keep it concise\nExplain AI[/INST] Artificial intelligence..."

content.how_it_works: Processes raw text inputs through tokenization rules optimized for LoRA training, adding model-specific special tokens when requested. Outputs structured datasets in selected formats with proper formatting for training frameworks.
